title: viola striis-notata
intro: Viola striis-notata, also known as the striated pansy or heart's ease, is a perennial plant species belonging to the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola striis-notata include its use in treating digestive issues, inflammation, and as an antiseptic. The health benefits of consuming or applying Viola striis-notata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of Viola striis-notata include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used internally or externally for therapeutic purposes.
